text:
First, note that time zones as we know them didn't exist in 1501, but for the purpose of this exercise, we'll use modern time zone definitions.  

Asia/Kolkata is UTC+5:30.  
US/Mountain is UTC-7 during standard time (no DST in 1501).  

Time difference:  
UTC-7 minus UTC+5:30 = -12 hours 30 minutes.  

11:00 PM (23:00) in Kolkata → subtract 12 hours 30 minutes:  
23:00 - 12:30 = 10:30 (same day).  

But crossing the International Date Line? No — time zone difference is less than 24 hours, so we check:  
Kolkata is ahead of Mountain, so Mountain time is earlier.  
Subtract 12h30m from 23:00 → 10:30 AM on May 12, 1501.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1501-05-12 10:30
